dailygoal.title: Daily Goals
dailygoal.subtitle: Set your goals for today. Complete them. Build momentum.
dailygoal.addGoal: Add a new goal for today...
dailygoal.noGoalsDesc: Add a goal above to get started with your day
dailygoal.tip1: Set 3-5 realistic goals per day for best results
dailygoal.tip2: Complete easier goals first to build momentum
dailygoal.tip3: Your goals reset daily—focus on today, not tomorrow

streak.title: NoFap Tracker
streak.subtitle: Self-control through discipline. Freedom through consistency.
streak.checkInQuestion: How was today? Be honest with yourself.
streak.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow to continue your journey.
streak.fact1: Every day you don't relapse strengthens your neural pathways of self-control.
streak.fact2: Urges are temporary. Discipline is permanent.
streak.fact3: If you relapse, it's not failure—it's data. Learn and restart immediately.
streak.activityDescription: Green blocks = days you stayed consistent. Empty blocks = reset days or before streak started.

mood.logDailyTrends: Log moods daily to see trends!

normalMode.name: BaalVeer
normalMode.subtitle: Your wellness companion. Ask me about fitness, nutrition, mental health, sleep, and building positive habits.

adultMode.name: MasterGogo
adultMode.subtitle: Your adult wellness guide. Here to discuss challenges, boundaries, and personal growth with maturity and respect.
suggestions: How to manage impulses and urges?

normalMode: Laughing can increase blood flow by 20%, improving cardiovascular function. So, laughter really can be good medicine!
Men who talk about their emotions have 23% lower stress levels than those who suppress them.
Exercise increases serotonin production by up to 300%, naturally improving mood and reducing depression.
Quality sleep improves emotional regulation. Men sleeping 7-9 hours process emotions 40% better.
Deep breathing activates the parasympathetic nervous system, reducing stress hormones within 5 minutes.
Social connections reduce mortality risk by 50% — talking to friends is medicine for the mind.
Practicing gratitude daily increases dopamine and serotonin levels, improving overall mental health.
Cold water exposure can reduce anxiety and boost resilience by activating the body's stress response system.
adultMode: Pornography consumption can reduce dopamine sensitivity over time, affecting motivation and satisfaction in real-world relationships.
Poor impulse control often stems from weak prefrontal cortex activation — practice delays strengthen decision-making.
Consent violations damage not only victims but also perpetrators' long-term psychological health and relationships.
Accountability for one's actions triggers neuroplasticity — the brain rewires through conscious behavioral change.
Emotional regulation skills reduce harmful behaviors by 70% — that's why self-awareness saves lives.
Boundary violations often escalate — respecting limits in small moments prevents serious harm later.
Self-control is like a muscle — exercising it daily strengthens willpower and reduces impulsive behavior.
Genuine intimacy requires vulnerability and trust — neither can exist without respect and consent.

adult.title: Adult Mode
adult.description: Access advanced health content for adults 18+
adult.disclaimer: This section contains mature health content. By enabling adult mode, you confirm you are 18 or older and consent to view this content.
adult.ageRestricted: You must be 18 or older to access this section.
